name: Chocolate Chip-Date Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. I first tasted this cake 28 years ago at a Family Reunion, and have enjoyed it many times since.
2. Pour boiling water over dates and baking soda; mix until combined and let cool.
3. In a mixing bowl, cream shortening and sugar; add beaten eggs and mix well.
4. Add the cooled date mixture and blend together.
5. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt into a separate bowl.
6. Add this dry mixture to the date mixture and mix until combined.
7. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 9x13-inch pan.
8. Over the top of the cake batter, sprinkle evenly:
- 6 oz Chocolate chips
- 1/2 cup Chopped nuts
- 1/2 cup Sugar
9. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes.
